meta_title: For Students: SaaS pricing to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to SaaS pricing and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: SaaS Pricing to Solve No SaaS Knowledge
content.seo_description: Master SaaS pricing strategies to overcome no SaaS knowledge. A beginner-level tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code to launch your first project.
content.answer_block: SaaS pricing is the engine of your business. By moving from cost-plus pricing to value-based tiers, you align revenue with user success. Use Antigravity to scaffold your subscription logic and Claude Code to automate the integration of Stripe, ensuring your first project is financially viable and scalable from day one.
content.intro:
You have the code, you have the vision, but you are staring at a blank screen when it comes to the business logic of your first SaaS. Most students get trapped in 'feature-creep' because they don't know how to monetize their effort. Without a pricing strategy, your project is just a hobby; with one, it becomes a business.

Today, we bridge that gap. We will turn your technical curiosity into a professional asset by implementing a robust pricing architecture. Using AI-assisted tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, we will transform your conceptual project into a production-ready SaaS, giving you the portfolio piece that employers actually want to see.

steps.title: Define Your Value Metric
steps.description: Before writing code, identify the core unit of value your users pay for (e.g., tokens, storage, or seats).
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a SaaS architect. Help me define a value-based pricing metric for a [Insert Project Idea] that scales with user usage while maintaining high profit margins.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze pricing strategy for my current project architecture'

steps.title: Scaffold the Subscription Model
steps.description: Create the data structure for your pricing tiers using Antigravity to ensure your database schema is ready for Stripe integration.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a database schema for a SaaS subscription model with three tiers: Free, Pro, and Enterprise, including support for monthly and yearly billing cycles.

steps.title: Integrate Stripe Checkout
steps.description: Use Claude Code to safely implement the Stripe Checkout session logic in your backend.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a secure server-side function to create a Stripe Checkout session based on the user's selected subscription tier.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement stripe checkout session handler in backend'

steps.title: Implement Webhook Listeners
steps.description: Crucial for handling subscription lifecycle events like cancellations or payment failures automatically.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a robust webhook handler for Stripe events to update user subscription status in my database in real-time.

steps.title: Build the Pricing Dashboard
steps.description: Create a high-converting UI where users can view tiers and manage their current subscription.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a clean, high-converting React pricing component that highlights the 'Pro' tier and handles toggle states for monthly/yearly billing.

pro_tips: Always offer an annual discount to improve your upfront cash flow and reduce churn.
Never hardcode prices in your frontend; always fetch them from the Stripe API to ensure sync.
Implement a 'Grace Period' logic in your database to prevent immediate lockout during payment failures.
Use feature flags to gate specific app functionality based on the user's active subscription ID.
Track 'Trial-to-Paid' conversion rates early; it's the most important metric for any SaaS builder.
content.next_steps: Once your pricing is live, focus on deploying to Vercel and setting up a basic analytics dashboard to track user conversions.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the technical blueprint to monetize your ingenuity and build a sustainable SaaS product. Stop waiting for the perfect moment—start building the future today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
